name: MR. AWANT VERMA
description:
20+ years of experience in marketing and product
management across various industries
Previously worked with Kantar Group, Reliance
Capital, Apollo International, Finstar Financial
Group (Russia)
Mechanical Engineer, MBA in Marketing &
Finance, Professional Diploma in Digital Marketing
and Certification Programme in Brand Management
from IIM-B

name: MS. VANDANA CHHIBBER
description:
Seasoned Telesales Leader with 20+ years of experience in driving revenue growth, customer engagement, and operational excellence across Telecom, Real Estate, E-commerce, and Distribution sectors.
Expert in sales strategy, CRM optimization, and process automation, consistently delivering higher conversion rates and improved customer satisfaction.
Recognized for data-driven leadership and building high-performing telesales teams that achieved measurable gains in revenue, retention, and efficiency.
Awarded multiple industry accolades, including the BIG Leap Award and Hall of Fame, and holds a PGDM in Marketing from NMIMS.

name: MR DHRUV HANDA
description:
Results-driven sales leader with over 19 years of experience in driving business growth and revenue optimization in the hospitality industry.
Demonstrated success with prestigious brands such as ITC and The Oberoi Group, most recently serving as Associate Director of Sales at The Oberoi, New Delhi.
Expertise in business development, negotiation, and strategic leadership, with a proven ability to craft and execute high-impact sales initiatives.
Recognized for building strong client relationships, delivering consistent results, and driving long-term business success.
Committed to excellence and innovation, and poised to bring valuable insights and growth strategies to new opportunities.

name: MS. Tanima Sur
description:
15+ plus years experience in Human Resources
Previously worked Spencers Retail, Vodafone and VFS Global 
She has vast knowledge in overseeing human resource operations and activities which includes the entire gambit of Employee Life cycle

name: MR. MANOJ DHANRMANI
description:
Over 30 years of dynamic experience spanning Aviation, Telecom, Media, and Automotive Industries.
Previously he has worked with AirAsia, GoAir and Vodafone.
Track record of driving collaboration across diverse sectors and fostering operational excellence.
A result-oriented leader, brings to the table a unique blend of visionary thinking, effective communication, and a keen understanding of customer needs.
Bachelor  of Engineering (Mechanical).

name: MR. ADITYA SANGHI
description:
Over 25 years of experience in building technology and large scale software systems.
Previously Cofounder CTO of Punchh Inc (sold to PAR Tech).
Graduate of Queensland University of Technology, Australia.

name: MR .RAJINDER RAI
description:
Four decades of rich experience in tourism and hospitality
Represented as a President of TAAI (Travel Agents Association of India)
Vice-President of UFTAA and part of the advisory board of FICCI, CII, Assocham,
PHD CHAMBERS OF COMMERCE
He is an integral part of the Tourism Advisory Committee of the Indian National Trust for
Art and Cultural Heritage.

name: MRS . MADHURIMA RAI
description:
B.A. (Hons) in Economics from Delhi University
20 plus years experience in the field of fashion, travel and tourism
Responsible for overall day to day working, finance

name: MR. KRISHNA KUMAR
description:
27 years of experience in the field of travel trade
Responsible for timely delivery and quality services provided by the Company

name: MS. Neha Goyal
description: A qualified Lawyer and Company Secretary, with 15+ years of expertise in Corporate Secretarial and Legal matters, Neha has extensive exposure to regulatory authorities like ROC, NCLT, RBI, CBI, and ED. She has guided businesses across Solar, Real Estate, IT, and Agriculture sectors, handling compliance, due diligence, and drafting key agreements, including MOUs with state governments. As a POSH trainer and ICC external member, Neha plays a vital role in ensuring corporate legal and compliance excellence.

name: MR. SHIVAZ RAI
description:
20 plus years of experience in Finance Industry

Diploma in Business Management from Harvard Business School also holder of CFA & FRM
BA from University of Chicago in Economics and Mathematics
Having experience in Fund Management & Trading at RBC, QVT, UBS & JP Morgan

name: MR. PINAK RAANJAN CHAKRAVARTY
description:
Ambassador Chakravarty joined the Indian Foreign Service in 1977 and held key appointments in a long and distinguished diplomatic career
He has considerable experience in South Asia and has had two diplomatic stints in Dhaka, first as the Deputy Chief of Mission and then as the High
Commissioner of the Indian High Commission in Bangladesh.
He brings in significant and invaluable diplomatic and mission experience

name: MR. YASHOVARDHAN AZAD
description:
40 years plus wide experience in national security and governance.
He served as a Special Director in the Intelligence Bureau (IB) and Secretary (Security) to the Government of India.
He has been awarded the Police Medal for meritorious services and the President of India’s medal for distinguished service.
He brings his extensive experience and networks in government and national security.

name: MR. AJAY K. JAIN
description:
Senior advocate in High Court and Supreme Court of India Practice areas – Constitutional Law, Contracts (Governments & Private) Taxation, Property & Commercial Law, Recovery Law and Economic Offences.
He specializes In corporate Affairs / Corporate Restructuring / Insolvency / Recovery matters
He is practicing before the Supreme Court of India High Court of Delhi and other High Courts of India as well as before DRT, DRAT, NCLT & NCLAT
He has handled matters before Arbitration Tribunals and also as Arbitrator.
He is also Ex-Legal Advisor of Tuberculosis Association of India, Ex-Member of Ethics Committee, Medical Council of India, and Ex – Independent Director of the Insolvency Professionals Agency of Institute of Cost Accountants of India (IPA ICAI)

name: MR. GAURAV KUMAR
description:
A Company Secretary.
5 years of experience in the field of Corporate and Securities Law.

name: MR. NEERAJ KUMAR
description:
Extensive experience driving global business development, strategic partnerships, and Korea market expansion across multiple industries.
Worked with leading tech and digital companies in Korea — including Naver, Match Group, and Estsoft — leading initiatives in growth, localization, and cross-border collaboration.
Trilingual professional with deep expertise in managing cross-cultural teams, accelerating revenue growth, and executing new market entry strategies in Asia and beyond.
Recognized for bridging international business ecosystems through data-driven strategy, operational excellence, and partner alignment.
Holds a Master’s in Global Economy & Strategy from Yonsei University, and a Bachelor’s from Jawaharlal Nehru University.

name: MR. ASHUTOSH VASHISHT
description:
20+ years of experience in IT Infrastructure Management, Technology Operations, Automation, and Enterprise Governance, with a strong reputation for building secure, scalable, and future-ready technology ecosystems across diverse industries.
Previously associated with leading organisations such as Helm360, MCube Advisors, Integreon, Genpact, and IBM Daksh, where he spearheaded initiatives in cloud modernisation, cybersecurity, data-centre optimisation, and enterprise digital transformation.
Currently leads strategic technology programs focused on IT governance, security enhancement, infrastructure modernisation, and seamless application delivery across the organisation.
Recognised for his strategic foresight, innovation mindset, and execution-driven leadership, committed to creating sustainable, high-performance technology environments that drive business growth and digital excellence.

name: MR. ANKIT LAMBA
description:
With over 23 years of experience in Sales, Operations, Client Relationship Management, and Global Recruitment, he has built a strong reputation for driving business growth and operational excellence across diverse industries, including Telecom, Travel & Tourism, Visa Services, and Global Recruitment.
Previously associated with leading brands such as Hutch, Vodafone, and Reliance Jio Infocom, where he contributed to key business development and expansion initiatives.
Currently leads strategic initiatives to connect international employers with skilled talent across global markets.
Known for his strategic vision and execution-driven leadership, he focuses on building sustainable, high-performing recruitment networks that enable business growth and global workforce success.

name: MR. SARFARAZ ANWAR
description:
10 years of experience in the visa services sector, successfully leading and managing Visa Application Centers for multiple diplomatic missions across India.
Proven expertise in center operations, stakeholder engagement, staff training, and process optimization, ensuring seamless applicant experience and operational excellence.
Known for fostering strong relationships with embassy officials, vendors, and internal teams through exceptional interpersonal and communication skills.
A committed and adaptable leader, dedicated to continuous learning and alignment with evolving global visa regulations and service standards.

name: MR. GAGANDEEP SINGH BHATIA
description:
Management graduate.
20 years plus experience in the consumer durable,
telecom and travel industry spanning across multiple
organisations like Voltas limited, Vodafone, Go Air
and Yatra Online.
Expertise in sales, distribution and channel management.
Proven track record in strategic planning, leading
large teams and client relationship management.
